suite.name: Tc 1 Auth Create Token

test.name: TC-1 [POST] CREATE AUTH OR TOKEN FOR THE BOOK - SUCCESSFUL(Valid)

kw.name: Given KW: To open the workbook to the specified path.
kw.doc: This Keyword is opening the excelsheets to write & read data's.

kw.name: Open Workbook
kw.doc: Opens the workbook found at the given file path. _NOTE_: Please note that at present _XLS_ files are not supported.

kw.name: Given KW: Interacting with the Excel sheet2.
kw.doc: This Keyword is calling the other user defined keywords, created above for interaction with sheets 2.

kw.name: KW: Switch sheets 2.
kw.doc: This Keyword will help to switch to the sheet named "Create_Token".

kw.name: Switch Sheet
kw.doc: Switches to the sheet with the supplied name within the active workbook.

kw.name: KW: Get the Column Count.
kw.doc: This Keyword will count the total column used for the active sheet.

kw.name: Get Column Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of non-empty columns in the active sheet.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: KW: Get the Row Count.
kw.doc: This Keyword will count the total row used for the active sheet.

kw.name: Get Row Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of non-empty rows in the active sheet.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: KW: Globally evalutaing to the excel sheet.
kw.doc: This Keyword will evaluate the total row used plus one extra row (EX: 33 rows used + 1 row).

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: When KW: Creating Auth or Token POST Session.
kw.doc: Create a HTTP session to a server. With an alias, where Robot Framework alias is to identify the session. Including the Base url of the server Verify HTTPS request is being made in Robot Framework.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=Restful_Brooker, url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0

kw.name: Then KW: Request Header.
kw.doc: APIs require to send particular headers along with requests, typically to provide additional metadata about the operation that are performing. Can set these up in the Headers. Enter any key-value pairs needed and it will be send along with the request.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.
kw.msg: ${useragent} = Mozilla/5.0 CK={} (Windows NT 6.1; WOW64; Trident/7.0; rv:11.0) like Gecko

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${useragent} = Mozilla/5.0 CK={} (Windows NT 6.1; WOW64; Trident/7.0; rv:11.0) like Gecko

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.
kw.msg: ${Header} = {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 CK={} (Windows NT 6.1; WOW64; Trident/7.0; rv:11.0) like Gecko', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'accept': 'application/json'}

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${Header} = {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 CK={} (Windows NT 6.1; WOW64; Trident/7.0; rv:11.0) like Gecko', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'accept': 'application/json'}

kw.name: And KW: POST Body with JSON Keys & Value.
kw.doc: Need to send body data using KEY-VALUE pairs with requests whenever need to add or update structured data.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Write To Cell
kw.doc: Writes a value to the supplied cell.

kw.name: Write To Cell
kw.doc: Writes a value to the supplied cell.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.arg: KW: Response of the POST Request.
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: Response of the POST Request.
kw.doc: The response viewer helps to ensure the correctness of API responses. An API response consists of the body, headers, and the status code. It organizes body and headers in different forms. The status code and the completion time of the API call is visible. The response also contains the HTTP specification default description. However, API authors can also add custom message.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Write To Cell
kw.doc: Writes a value to the supplied cell.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Request Should Be Successful
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is a client or server error (4xx, 5xx).

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Convert String To JSON
kw.doc: Convert String to JSON object

kw.name: Get Value From Json
kw.doc: Get Value From JSON using JSONPath

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Write To Cell
kw.doc: Writes a value to the supplied cell.

kw.name: Then KW: To save & close the workbook to the specified path.
kw.doc: This Keyword will help to save all the data's written to the sheet and will close it safely.

kw.name: Save
kw.doc: Saves the changes to the currently active workbook.

kw.name: Close Workbook
kw.doc: Closes the workbook identified by the supplied alias.

test.doc: This TC is to create AUTH or TOKEN with user credentials.

test.name: TC-2 [POST] CREATE AUTH OR TOKEN FOR THE BOOK - UNSUCCESSFUL(Invalid)

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.arg: KW: Creating Auth or Token POST Session.
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: Creating Auth or Token POST Session.
kw.doc: Create a HTTP session to a server. With an alias, where Robot Framework alias is to identify the session. Including the Base url of the server Verify HTTPS request is being made in Robot Framework.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=Restful_Brooker, url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: Request Header.
kw.doc: APIs require to send particular headers along with requests, typically to provide additional metadata about the operation that are performing. Can set these up in the Headers. Enter any key-value pairs needed and it will be send along with the request.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.
kw.msg: ${useragent} = Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/90.0.4430.82 Mobile Safari/537.36

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${useragent} = Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/90.0.4430.82 Mobile Safari/537.36

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.arg: KW: POST Body with Invalid JSON Keys & Value.
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.doc: Need to send body data using KEY-VALUE pairs with requests whenever need to add or update structured data.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.arg: KW: Response of the POST Request.
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: Response of the POST Request.
kw.doc: The response viewer helps to ensure the correctness of API responses. An API response consists of the body, headers, and the status code. It organizes body and headers in different forms. The status code and the completion time of the API call is visible. The response also contains the HTTP specification default description. However, API authors can also add custom message.

kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Request Should Be Successful
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is a client or server error (4xx, 5xx).

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Value
kw.doc: Fails if ``value`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

test.doc: This TC is to check AUTH or TOKEN with user invalid credentials.

suite.doc: TC for Creating Auth or Token.

test.name: TC-1 [POST] CREATE BOOKING FOR THE BOOK - SUCCESSFUL

kw.name: Given KW: To open the workbook to the specified path.
kw.doc: This Keyword is opening the excelsheets to write & read data's.

kw.name: Open Workbook
kw.doc: Opens the workbook found at the given file path. _NOTE_: Please note that at present _XLS_ files are not supported.

kw.name: Given KW: Interacting with the Excel sheet1.
kw.doc: This Keyword is calling the other user defined keywords, created above for interaction with sheets 1.

kw.name: KW: Switch sheets 1.
kw.doc: This Keyword will help to switch to the sheet named "Create_User".

kw.name: Switch Sheet
kw.doc: Switches to the sheet with the supplied name within the active workbook.

kw.name: KW: Get the Column Count.
kw.doc: This Keyword will count the total column used for the active sheet.

kw.name: Get Column Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of non-empty columns in the active sheet.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: KW: Get the Row Count.
kw.doc: This Keyword will count the total row used for the active sheet.

kw.name: Get Row Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of non-empty rows in the active sheet.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: KW: Globally evalutaing to the excel sheet.
kw.doc: This Keyword will evaluate the total row used plus one extra row (EX: 33 rows used + 1 row).

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Given KW: Create firstName & LastName using Faker.
kw.doc: This keyword will help to generate the unique firstName & LastName.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Then KW: Saving the 1st & Last name to excel.
Write To Cell
kw.doc: Writes a value to the supplied cell.

kw.name: Write To Cell
kw.doc: Writes a value to the supplied cell.

kw.name: And KW: Create total price using Faker.
kw.doc: This keyword will help to generate the unique price value.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Then KW: Saving the fake price value to excel.
Write To Cell
kw.doc: Writes a value to the supplied cell.

kw.name: Then KW: Create dummy word using Faker.
kw.doc: This keyword will help to generate the unique dummy word.

kw.name: Word
kw.doc: Generate a word.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: KW: Saving the fake word to excel.
Write To Cell
kw.doc: Writes a value to the supplied cell.

kw.name: And KW: Today's Date is.
kw.doc: This Keyword will help to generate current date the TC executed.

kw.name: Date This Month
kw.doc: Gets a Date object for the current month.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Then KW: Saving the current date to excel.
Write To Cell
kw.doc: Writes a value to the supplied cell.

kw.name: Then KW: Saving the current date&time to excel.
Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Write To Cell
kw.doc: Writes a value to the supplied cell.

kw.name: Then KW: Future's Date is.
kw.doc: This Keyword will help to generate future date the TC executed.

kw.name: Future Date
kw.doc: Get a Date object based on a random date between 1 day from now and a given date. Accepts date strings that can be recognized by strtotime().

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: And KW: Saving the future date to excel.
Write To Cell
kw.doc: Writes a value to the supplied cell.

kw.doc: Flag for Random True or False.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=Restful_Brooker, url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0

kw.name: Then KW: Without Request Header.
kw.doc: APIs require to send particular headers along with requests, typically to provide additional metadata about the operation that are performing. Can set these up in the Headers. Enter any key-value pairs needed and it will be send along with the request.

kw.name: KW: Response of the Invalid POST Request.
kw.doc: The response viewer helps to ensure the correctness of API responses. An API response consists of the body, headers, and the status code. It organizes body and headers in different forms. The status code and the completion time of the API call is visible. The response also contains the HTTP specification default description. However, API authors can also add custom message.

kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.msg: POST Response : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking status=500, reason=Internal Server Error headers={'Server': 'Cowboy', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Content-Type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '21', 'Etag': 'W/"15-/6VXivhc2MKdLfIkLcUE47K6aH0"', 'Date': 'Wed, 15 Jun 2022 03:53:23 GMT', 'Via': '1.1 vegur'} body=Internal Server Error
HTTPError: 500 Server Error: Internal Server Error for url: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.msg: Executing keyword 'KW: Response of the Invalid POST Request.' failed: HTTPError: 500 Server Error: Internal Server Error for url: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking

test.doc: This TC is to create booking with user details.

suite.name: Tc 3 Booking Getbookingids

test.name: TC-1 [GET] FETCH ALL THE CREATED BOOKING ID's - SUCCESSFUL(Valid)

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.arg: KW: Creating Auth or Token POST Session.
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: Creating Auth or Token POST Session.
kw.doc: Create a HTTP session to a server. With an alias, where Robot Framework alias is to identify the session. Including the Base url of the server Verify HTTPS request is being made in Robot Framework.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=Restful_Brooker, url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: Request Header.
kw.doc: APIs require to send particular headers along with requests, typically to provide additional metadata about the operation that are performing. Can set these up in the Headers. Enter any key-value pairs needed and it will be send along with the request.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.
kw.msg: ${useragent} = Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/90.0.4430.82 Mobile Safari/537.36

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${useragent} = Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/90.0.4430.82 Mobile Safari/537.36

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.
kw.msg: ${Header} = {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/90.0.4430.82 Mobile Safari/537.36', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'accept': 'application/json'}

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.
kw.msg: ${Header} = {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/90.0.4430.82 Mobile Safari/537.36', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'accept': 'application/json'}

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.arg: KW: Response of the GET Request.
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: KW: Response of the GET Request.
kw.doc: The response viewer helps to ensure the correctness of API responses. An API response consists of the body, headers, and the status code. It organizes body and headers in different forms. The status code and the completion time of the API call is visible. The response also contains the HTTP specification default description. However, API authors can also add custom message.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking path_url=/booking headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/90.0.4430.82 Mobile Safari/537.36', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=None

GET Response : url=https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking status=200, reason=OK headers={'Server': 'Cowboy', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Content-Type': },{"b... (set the log level to DEBUG or TRACE to see the full content)

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Request Should Be Successful
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is a client or server error (4xx, 5xx).

test.doc: This TC is to fetch all the created booking ids.

suite.doc: Suite for Fetching the Booking Ids.

suite.stat: Pom Test Suite.Tc 1 Auth Create Token

errors.msg: Error in file 'C:\Users\veera\Documents\GitHub\github_all_in_one_repo\package_restful_booker_herokuapp_enhancement\pom_test_suite\tc_3_booking_getbookingids.robot' on line 44: Non-existing setting 'return'.
Executing keyword 'KW: Response of the Invalid POST Request.' failed: HTTPError: 500 Server Error: Internal Server Error for url: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking
